_comment.name: CVM DTC Codes grabbed from Diagbox FDB. ECUTYPE union: CVM, CVM_2, CVM_3, CVM_SEA, CVM_W2_25. Conflicting labels resolved by majority vote across ECUTYPEs.

B1000.name: Downloading of the calibration of the multifunction video camera

B1174.name: Fault adaptation of the windscreen sensor impossible

B1214.name: DIAG procedure in progress deactivating the multifunction video camera

B1215.name: Coherence between the information from the built-in systems interface and the emergency collision braking function

B1238.name: Field of vision of the multifunction video camera

B1239.name: Steering wheel angle sensor is faulty

B1298.name: Inconsistency between the frontal-collision activation request sent by the smart service box and the frontal-collision function of the front radar

B129A.name: Lack of coherence between the activation request for the adaptive cruise control and the status of the cruise control selection sent by the built-in systems interface

B129B.name: Lack of coherence between the adaptive cruise control request, the distance alert ECU request and the speed setting transmitted by the built-in systems interface

B129C.name: Lack of coherence between the activation statuses of the adaptive cruise control and of the speed limiter sent by the built-in systems interface

B129D.name: Lack of coherence between the torque reference value and the accelerator pedal

B129E.name: Inconsistency between the braking request signal and the torque request received by the adaptive cruise control

B129F.name: Inconsistency between the torque request status and the adaptive cruise control status

B12A0.name: Inconsistency between the deceleration signal from the multifunction video camera and the adaptive cruise control

B12A1.name: Inconsistency between the reference speed transmitted by the adaptive cruise control and the speed reference value transmitted by the built-in systems interface

B12A5.name: Inconsistency between the reference value transmitted by the distance alert ECU and the speed reference value transmitted by the adaptive cruise control

B12A7.name: The adaptive cruise control status received by the engine management ECU

B12A9.name: Adaptive cruise control status received by the dynamic stability control ECU

B12AB.name: Signal from the automatic gearbox/piloted manual gearbox

U0037.name: Multifunction video camera ECU not communicating on the 1 high speed network

U0046.name: Multifunction video camera ECU not communicating on the 2 high speed network

U0115.name: Communication with the engine management ECU on the CAN High Speed 2 network

U0126.name: Communication with the steering wheel angle sensor

U0129.name: No communication with the ECU on the CAN High Speed 2 network

U0143.name: Communication with the motorised boot unit

U0146.name: No communication with the VSM on the CAN High Speed 2 network

U0147.name: No communication with the built-in systems interface on the high speed CAN 1

U023A.name: No communication with the multifunction video camera on the CAN High Speed 1

U0301.name: Invalid data or too-short frame received from the engine (TH/HY) or from the EVCU (EV)

U0315.name: Invalid data or too-short frame received from the brake control ECU

U0320.name: Invalid data or too-short frame received from the electric power-steering ECU

U0322.name: Invalid data or too-short frame received from the smart service box (VSM)

U0328.name: Communication with the steering wheel angle sensor

U0401.name: Data received from the smart service box ECU on the CAN network is invalid

U0402.name: Communication with the automatic gearbox ECU on the CAN network

U0415.name: Communication with the brake control ECU on the CAN network is invalid

U0420.name: Data received from the electric power-steering ECU on the CAN network is invalid

U0422.name: Data received from the smart service box ECU on the CAN network is invalid

U1000.name: Multifunction video camera ECU not communicating

U1007.name: Suspension and wheels network or high speed 2 network

U1009.name: Multifunction video camera ECU not communicating on the suspension and wheels CAN or high speed 2 network

U1011.name: Multifunction video camera ECU not communicating on the ADAS CAN

U1105.name: Communication with the steering wheel angle sensor or the ABS/ESP ECU

U1108.name: Communication with the engine management ECU

U1109.name: Communication with the gearbox ECU on the 1 high speed network

U1113.name: Absence of communication on the CAN with the ABS/ESP ECU

U1148.name: Communication with the engine management ECU on the 2 high speed network

U1150.name: No communication with the electronic control system ECU on the CAN High Speed 2 network

U1158.name: Communication with the built-in systems interface on the 2 high speed network

U1162.name: Communication with the distance alert ECU on the ADAS CAN

U1163.name: Distance alert ECU absent from the ADAS CAN

U1205.name: Communication with the steering wheel angle sensor

U1208.name: Communication with the engine management ECU

U1262.name: Communication with the distance alert ECU

U1276.name: Data received on the CAN network is invalid

U1305.name: Communication with the steering wheel angle sensor

U1308.name: Invalid data or too-short frame received from the engine (TH/HY) or from the EVCU (EV)

U1354.name: Communication with the assembled fuel-cell ECU on the CAN network

U1538.name: Communication with the standalone telematics box on the CAN network

U1937.name: Communication with the standalone telematics box on the CAN network

U1EF4.name: Absence of communication with the BSI

U1F03.name: Absence of communication with the BSI

U1F0F.name: Multifunction video camera ECU not communicating on the CAN

U1F2E.name: Communication with the engine management ECU on the high speed CAN 1

U1F52.name: Communication with the seat vibrators control unit
